meta.name: Eco Footwear
meta.description: A modern, eco-conscious footwear and apparel store with a clean, airy, and slightly earthy aesthetic. It uses full-width lifestyle imagery, prominent typography, and a muted, nature-inspired color palette to appeal to sustainably-minded consumers.

fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace

header.notes: Clean header with logo on left, centered navigation links, and icon-only actions on the right.

footer.description: Email signup, multiple link columns, social icons, and B-Corp certification.
footer.notes: Dark footer contrasting with the mostly light page. Features a prominent email subscription input, 4 columns of links, social media icons, and regional/certification badges.

productCard.notes: Clean white cards with product image, title, variant name, color swatches, and price (with original price struck through if on sale).

productGrid.notes: Horizontal scrolling or wrapped grid of 4 product cards. Navigation arrows or category tabs above.

featuredProducts.label: BESTSELLERS
featuredProducts.heading: Dasher NZ
featuredProducts.notes: Large featured product shot with title, description, price, and CTA buttons.

sections.name: header
sections.layout: Flexbox row, logo left, nav center, actions right

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-width background image, text/CTAs in top right

design.styling: Overlay or embedded text, pill-shaped buttons

content.headline: Campaign title for new collection
content.cta: 2 buttons: white background, dark text, pill-shaped (9999px radius)

media.description: Overhead shot of several pairs of shoes arranged in a circle on a neutral background, highlighting a specific color with a white box.

content.specialElements: White box overlay highlighting a specific product color

sections.name: category-tiles
sections.layout: CSS grid 4 equal columns with gap

design.text: White text, small uppercase, outline buttons
design.styling: Rounded corners on images, subtle hover effect

content.cta: Outline buttons on each tile, pill-shaped

media.description: Grid of 4 category tiles, each showing a single shoe against a solid, muted color background matching the shoe.

sections.notes: Tiles act as links to categories

design.text: Dark foreground, prominent serif or display font for title

media.description: Large side-profile shot of a single shoe on a light background with subtle dot pattern.

sections.name: brand-collaboration
sections.layout: 2-column grid, unequal split or mixed media sizes

design.text: White or dark depending on background, sans-serif
design.styling: Rounded corners on media, pill-shaped buttons

content.headline: Collaboration title
content.cta: Single white button, dark text, pill-shaped (9999px radius)

media.description: Mix of lifestyle shot with person outdoors, a landscape shot with brand logos, and top-down product shots.

design.styling: Centered text in left column, rounded corners on media

media.description: Left: product shot on light background. Right: lifestyle shot of person leaning against a vintage car.

sections.name: collection-grid
sections.layout: CSS grid 3 equal columns with gap

design.text: White text, serif or display font for title
design.styling: Rounded corners on images, overlay text, outline buttons

content.cta: Outline buttons on each tile, white, pill-shaped (9999px radius)

media.description: Grid of 3 lifestyle/product images (shoes on books, sandals outdoors, person in suit with flats) with dark overlays.

sections.notes: Tiles act as links to collections

design.styling: Cards with white background, rounded corners (0.5rem)

media.description: Grid of 4 product shots (shoes) on solid white backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Category tabs and slider navigation arrows above grid

sections.name: value-props

design.text: Dark foreground, sans-serif, small uppercase titles

sections.notes: Text-only cards highlighting brand values (comfort, sustainability, materials)

sections.name: footer
sections.layout: Grid layout, email left, link columns right, bottom bar

design.styling: Pill-shaped input for email, divider lines

content.headline: Subscribe text
content.cta: Sign up button inside input field
